firebaseNotConfigured.title: Firebase not configured
firebaseNotConfigured.message: Please set VITE_FIREBASE_* environment variables in .env and restart the dev server.

auth.resetSent: Password reset email sent, please check your inbox

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.noReminders: Nothing to follow up on today.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.empty: No contacts yet — tap the button in the corner to add one.
contacts.longSilenceWarning: No interactions in over 60 days — worth reaching out
contacts.name: Name

deleteContact.title: Delete contact?
deleteContact.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone (interaction history is not deleted automatically).

syncStatus.offlineTooltip: No network connection — data will sync automatically once you're back online

suggestedTopics.title: Suggested topics for {{name}}
suggestedTopics.description: AI will suggest a few topics worth bringing up, based on this contact's profile and recent interactions.
suggestedTopics.empty: No suggestions right now, try again later.
suggestedTopics.genericError: Couldn't get suggested topics. Please try again.

contactResearch.title: Web research summary for {{name}}
contactResearch.disclaimer: This summary is generated by AI from public web search results and may be inaccurate or about a different person with the same name. Please verify the sources yourself before relying on it.
contactResearch.empty: No research yet — tap "Search the web" to run the first search.

businessCard.title: Business card scan
businessCard.description: Take a photo or upload a business card — AI will extract the name, role, company, phone, and email.
businessCard.offlineError: Business card scanning is unavailable while offline.
businessCard.noNameError: Couldn't detect a name in this image — try a different photo.
businessCard.genericError: Business card scan failed. Please try again.

quickCapture.title: AI quick capture
quickCapture.textInputPlaceholder: E.g. Had lunch with John today, he'll introduce a PM next week, remind me to follow up in two weeks.
quickCapture.audioDescription: Record a short description — AI will split it into interactions, reminders, and suggestions.
quickCapture.offlineError: AI quick capture is unavailable while offline.
quickCapture.genericError: AI quick capture failed. Please try again.

import.title: Import contacts
import.description: Choose a vCard (.vcf) file to import multiple contacts.
import.noContactsFound: No contacts found in this file
import.foundCount: Found {{count}} contacts — select the ones to import:

assistantChat.title: AI Assistant
assistantChat.emptyHint: Ask me anything about your contacts, e.g. "What did I discuss with John last time?" or "Who do I know that works at Google?"
assistantChat.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

docImport.title: Import contacts from document
docImport.description: Upload a PDF, Word (.docx), or Excel (.xlsx/.csv) file containing a contact list. AI will extract the contacts for you to review before importing.
docImport.fileTooLarge: File is too large — please choose a file under {{maxMB}}MB.
docImport.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type — please choose a PDF, .docx, .xlsx, or .csv file.
docImport.offlineError: Document import is unavailable while offline.
docImport.noContactsFound: No contacts could be identified in this document.
docImport.genericError: Failed to parse this document. Please try again.
docImport.foundCount: Found {{count}} contacts — review and select the ones to import:
